reference: Hi, after the removal of the cast in a greenstick fracture of the forearm, normal activities can be started immediately. However, for contact sports, it is advisable to wait for at least three weeks to allow the bones to regain good strength. Thereafter, all sports activities can be resumed.
text: Hi. After the removal of the cast in a greenstick fracture of the forearm, normal activities can be started immediately. However, for contact sports, it is advisable to wait for at least 3 weeks to allow the bones to regain strength. Thereafter, all sports activities can be resumed.
